# Security Policy

## Supported versions

Hermes UI is pre-1.0; security fixes land on the latest `0.x` release.

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| 0.1.x   | ✅        |
| < 0.1   | ❌        |

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please report security issues **privately** — do not open a public issue.

Use GitHub's private vulnerability reporting: open the repository's **Security**
tab and click **Report a vulnerability**. This creates an advisory visible only
to the maintainers.

We aim to acknowledge reports within a few days and will keep you posted on
remediation. Reporters who want credit are acknowledged once a fix ships.
